name: Delete a part image removes it from the part
steps:
Given a part 'LED Red 3mm' has an associated image 'led-red.png'
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'LED Red 3mm'
When the user hovers over the part image and clicks 'Delete image'
When the user confirms the deletion
Then the part detail page for 'LED Red 3mm' shows the default image placeholder with no image associated

name: Select an existing image from the database for a part
steps:
Given at least one part image already exists in the database
Given a part 'Capacitor 100nF' exists with no part image
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Capacitor 100nF'
When the user hovers over the part image placeholder and clicks 'Select from existing images'
When the user selects an existing image from the displayed list
Then the part detail page for 'Capacitor 100nF' displays the selected existing image as the part image

name: Upload a new image for a part via the web interface
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' exists with no part image
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
When the user hovers over the part image placeholder to reveal the image action buttons
When the user clicks 'Upload new image' and selects a local image file 'resistor.png'
Then the part detail page displays the uploaded 'resistor.png' as the part image
